{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Heart of Visiria
| introduced = The Knight
}}

''See also: [[The Heart of Visiria Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Heart]] of [[Visiria]] is a highly potent restorative gem and planetary treasure belonging to the world of [[Visiria]], which is a key part of the [[Karoshan Alliance]]. As an artifact blessed by the planet's [[World Spirit]], it possesses immense healing capabilities, though performing tasks with its energy typically requires a team of seven people. The gem is subject to intense security, such as being sealed away by the [[Planetary Governor]] to prevent theft. While it can be used for significant restorative purposes, such as potentially recovering a [[Titan Knight]], its possession is politically sensitive; because it is a treasure of the [[Karoshan Alliance]], those who possess or attempt to steal it risk being hunted by the [[Alliance]]. The artifact's power is tied to the [[Aether]], allowing it to eventually regain its potency even after its energy has been depleted.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Heart]] of [[Visiria]] is a smooth, fist-sized [[ruby]] that serves as a planetary treasure of the world [[Visiria]]. As a gem blessed by a [[World Spirit]], this powerful restorative artifact functions as a healing item capable of bringing [[Parryl]] back. The characters are tasked with a mission to obtain the gem, which is located on a planet and remains susceptible to being stolen. Ultimately, the narrator intends to be sent to the location of the [[Heart]] of [[Visiria]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a smooth, fist-sized [[ruby]] and one of the most powerful restorative artifacts in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a planetary treasure of [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a subject of the mission.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a gem that the characters are tasked to obtain.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a planetary treasure that can be stolen.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is located on a planet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] can be used to bring [[Parryl]] back.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator intends to be sent to the [[Heart]] of [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a gem that acts as a healing item blessed by a [[World Spirit]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Heart of Visiria]] is a planetary treasure that was mysteriously returned to secure storage.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|I projected the hologram above my left wrist, where it showed a smooth, fist-sized ruby. “The Heart of Visiria,” I announced. “The good news is, this is one of the most powerful restorative artifacts in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Besides, with the Heart of Visiria, we can get Parryl back.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
